base_rules.name: 敏感信息搜索
base_rules.template: site:{domain} ( "默认密码" OR "学号" OR "工号")

base_rules.name: 后台接口和敏感信息探测
base_rules.template: site:{domain} (inurl:login OR inurl:admin OR inurl:index OR inurl:登录) OR (inurl:config | inurl:env | inurl:setting | inurl:backup | inurl:admin | inurl:php)

base_rules.name: 查找暴露的特殊文件
base_rules.template: site:{domain} filetype:txt OR filetype:xls OR filetype:xlsx OR filetype:doc OR filetype:docx OR filetype:pdf

base_rules.name: 已公开的 XSS 和重定向漏洞
base_rules.template: site:openbugbounty.org inurl:reports intext:{domain}

base_rules.name: 常见的敏感文件扩展
base_rules.template: site:{domain} ext:log | ext:txt | ext:conf | ext:cnf | ext:ini | ext:env | ext:sh | ext:bak | ext:backup | ext:swp | ext:old | ext:~ | ext:git | ext:svn | ext:htpasswd | ext:htaccess

base_rules.name: XSS 漏洞倾向参数
base_rules.template: inurl:q= | inurl:s= | inurl:search= | inurl:query= | inurl:keyword= | inurl:lang= inurl:& site:{domain}

base_rules.name: 重定向漏洞倾向参数
base_rules.template: inurl:url= | inurl:return= | inurl:next= | inurl:redirect= | inurl:redir= | inurl:ret= | inurl:r2= | inurl:page= inurl:& inurl:http site:{domain}

base_rules.name: SQL 注入倾向参数
base_rules.template: inurl:id= | inurl:pid= | inurl:category= | inurl:cat= | inurl:action= | inurl:sid= | inurl:dir= inurl:& site:{domain}

base_rules.name: SSRF 漏洞倾向参数
base_rules.template: inurl:http | inurl:url= | inurl:path= | inurl:dest= | inurl:html= | inurl:data= | inurl:domain= | inurl:page= inurl:& site:{domain}

base_rules.name: 本地文件包含（LFI）倾向参数
base_rules.template: inurl:include | inurl:dir | inurl:detail= | inurl:file= | inurl:folder= | inurl:inc= | inurl:locate= | inurl:doc= | inurl:conf= inurl:& site:{domain}

base_rules.name: 远程命令执行（RCE）倾向参数
base_rules.template: inurl:cmd | inurl:exec= | inurl:query= | inurl:code= | inurl:do= | inurl:run= | inurl:read= | inurl:ping= inurl:& site:{domain}

base_rules.name: 敏感参数
base_rules.template: inurl:email= | inurl:phone= | inurl:password= | inurl:secret= inurl:& site:{domain}

base_rules.name: API 文档
base_rules.template: inurl:apidocs | inurl:api-docs | inurl:swagger | inurl:api-explorer site:{domain}

base_rules.name: 代码泄露
base_rules.template: site:pastebin.com {domain}

base_rules.name: 云存储
base_rules.template: site:s3.amazonaws.com {domain}

base_rules.name: JFrog Artifactory
base_rules.template: site:jfrog.io {domain}

base_rules.name: Firebase
base_rules.template: site:firebaseio.com {domain}

base_rules.name: 文件上传端点
base_rules.template: site:{domain} "choose file"

base_rules.name: 漏洞赏金和漏洞披露程序
base_rules.template: "submit vulnerability report" | "powered by bugcrowd" | "powered by hackerone" site:*/security.txt "bounty"

base_rules.name: 暴露的 Apache 服务器状态
base_rules.template: site:*/server-status apache

base_rules.name: WordPress
base_rules.template: inurl:/wp-admin/admin-ajax.php

base_rules.name: 前台登录(教育网)
base_rules.template: site:edu.cn intext:管理|后台|登陆|用户名|密码|验证码|系统|帐号|手册|admin|login|sys|managetem|password|username

base_rules.name: 通用前台登录
base_rules.template: site:{domain} intext:管理|后台|登陆|用户名|密码|验证码|系统|帐号|admin|login|password|username
